name: Mischi3vo

sheet.name: Mischi3vo
sheet.background_story: Resilient bad ass who likes apple fritters. He has much influence in the Foresaken Lands and is highly esteemed. Often he is referred to as one of the foundational Pilgrims in all the lands. He always goes on dangerous missions in order to protect the Lands and his fellow Pilgrims. Rumor has it, his face is full of tatts showcasing his many accomplishments and wins in battle.
